title: cytisus supinus var. grandis
intro: Cytisus supinus var. grandis, also known as Rockrose, is a shrub-like perennial plant that belongs to the pea family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, respiratory problems, and as a diuretic due to its high content of alkaloids and glycosides. The health benefits of Cytisus supinus var. grandis include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and acting as a natural remedy for skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Rockrose can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used in traditional medicine as a dried root or in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
